CVE-2024-28084.title: p2putil.c in iNet wireless daemon (IWD) through 2.15 allows attac ...
CVE-2024-28084.description: p2putil.c in iNet wireless daemon (IWD) through 2.15 allows attackers to cause a denial of service (daemon crash) or possibly have unspecified other impact because of initialization issues in situations where parsing of advertised service information fails.
